prompt: A realistic documentary-style photo of an elementary school classroom during a math activity, with about 10 children seated around grouped wooden desks, wearing green and blue school uniforms, actively playing a colorful multiplication domino game. The camera is at child eye level, slightly angled downward toward the main table in the foreground. Center the scene on one square educational board game labeled in Portuguese, with the title "DOMINÓ DA MULTIPLICAÇÃO" on the lower edge and "TREINANDO AS TABUADAS" in the center, surrounded by a border of brightly colored domino-style multiplication tiles. Show 4 children clearly engaged around this main board: one child placing a yellow tile onto the board, one child holding a stack of multicolored tiles, one child watching from the left, and one child in a blue sleeve at the bottom edge arranging pieces. Include 2 shallow wooden boxes labeled "JOGO DE DOMINÓ," one near the center-left and one at the bottom-right, each containing colorful rectangular domino pieces. Scatter school materials naturally on the desks: 3 pencils, 2 worksheets, 1 water bottle, pencil cases, notebooks, and extra game tiles. In the background, show the rest of the classroom softly out of focus with additional students at desks, a bookshelf, a corkboard filled with children’s drawings, and a large multiplication chart poster on the left wall reading "TABUADA DE MULTIPLICAÇÃO." Bright natural daylight enters from tall windows on the right, giving the room a warm, lively, authentic school atmosphere. The educational board and tiles should use vivid classroom colors like yellow, blue, pink, green, and orange. Faces should be unobtrusive or de-emphasized, with the focus on hands-on learning, collaboration, and the multiplication domino activity. Vertical composition, highly realistic photography, candid classroom moment, sharp foreground details, soft depth of field in the background.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实的纪录片风格照片，拍摄的是小学课堂进行数学活动时的场景。约 10 名身穿蓝绿色校服的孩子围坐在拼凑的木桌旁，正积极地玩着色彩鲜艳的乘法多米诺骨牌游戏。相机处于儿童视线高度，略微向下倾斜对准前景的主桌。场景中心是一个方形的教育项目，上面用葡萄牙语标注，下边缘印有标题“DOMINÓ DA MULTIPLICAÇÃO”，中心印有“TREINANDO AS TABUADAS”，周围环绕着色彩鲜艳的多米诺骨牌式乘法块。画面中 4 名孩子正全神贯注地围绕着这个主项目：一名孩子正在将一块黄色牌放入项目中，一名孩子拿着一叠彩色牌，一名孩子在左侧观看，另一名穿着蓝色袖子的孩子在底边缘整理牌。包含 2 个贴有“JOGO DE DOMINÓ”标签的浅色木盒，一个位于中左侧，另一个位于右下角，盒内装有彩色长方形多米诺骨牌。课桌上自然地散落着学习用品：3 支铅笔、2 张练习纸、1 个水瓶、铅笔盒、笔记本和额外的游戏牌。背景中，教室的其他部分处于柔和的虚焦状态，可以看到其他学生坐在课桌旁、书架、贴满儿童画的软木板，以及左侧墙上挂着一张写有“TABUADA DE MULTIPLICAÇÃO”的大型乘法表海报。明亮的自然光从右侧的高窗射入，为房间营造出温暖、生动、真实的校园氛围。教育项目和牌应使用黄色、蓝色、粉色、绿色和橙色等鲜艳的课堂色彩。人物面部应模糊处理或弱化，重点在于动手学习、协作以及乘法多米诺骨牌活动。竖构图，高度写实的摄影作品，真实的课堂瞬间，前景细节清晰，背景具有柔和的景深。

breakdown.creativeCore: 乘法多米诺骨牌课堂活动：一张写实的课堂照片，展示了孩子们正在使用色彩鲜艳的乘法多米诺骨牌项目，非常适合用于教育材料、学校宣传或数学活动视觉素材。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:

[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, documentary]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
